svg.text: Domain name resolution — required by every domain-joined machine
IP address assignment from DHCP server to clients
Authentication tickets — every domain login and service access
RPC services: replication, WMI, remote management
Active Directory queries, Group Policy (636 = SSL)
Group Policy delivery, SYSVOL replication, file shares
Remote Desktop — admin access to servers and workstations
AD replication, DFSR — must be open DC-to-DC
VPN tunnel · time sync (Kerberos fails if clocks drift more than 5 min)
